## Change

Describe the focused change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] Added or updated tests
- [ ] `uv run ruff check src tests scripts`
- [ ] `uv run pytest -q`
- [ ] `uv build`
- [ ] No credentials, live evidence, or machine-specific paths added

## Security and spend impact

Describe any changes to provider eligibility, credentials, network behavior, file
writes, or external integrations. Write `None` when not applicable.
